name: sovereign-memory
description: Local-first Sovereign Memory bridge for Codex with Obsidian vault transparency.

interface.shortDescription: Local recall and Codex-owned Obsidian memory
interface.longDescription: Sovereign Memory gives Codex transparent local recall, manual vault-first learning, and readable audit logs through a local MCP server. It talks to the existing Sovereign daemon and keeps expensive extraction out of v1.
defaultPrompt: Recall Sovereign Memory for this task
Learn this in the Codex vault
Show recent Sovereign Memory audit logs
